debug_info.goal:
s : Set ℝ
h : NullMeasurableSet s volume
⊢ ∃ t ⊆ s, MeasurableSet t ∧ volume t = volume s ∧ volume (s \ t) = 0

proof:
rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, measure_congr heq, ae_le_set.mp heq.symm.le⟩
failed_attempts:
rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, measure_congr heq, measure_diff_null heq.symm.le⟩

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, measure_congr heq.symm, ae_le_set.mp heq.le⟩

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, measure_congr heq, measure_diff_null hts heq⟩
